name: U.S. Concrete, Inc.
description: U.S. Concrete, Inc. was a prominent American provider of ready-mixed concrete and related construction materials, serving major metropolitan areas across the United States. The company specialized in the production and delivery of high-quality concrete for infrastructure, commercial, and residential projects. In August 2021, U.S. Concrete was acquired by Vulcan Materials Company, a leading producer of construction aggregates. Following the completion of this acquisition, U.S. Concrete ceased trading as an independent entity on the NASDAQ and now operates as a wholly-owned subsidiary integrated into Vulcan Materials' extensive building materials network.
